---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Fiesta - Home"
subtitle: ""
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

<div class="video-wrapper">
  <video autoplay loop muted playsinline>
    <source src="GIF4_locations.webm" type="video/webm">
    <source src="GIF4_locations.mp4" type="video/mp4">
  </video>
</div>

::: {.hero-content}
::: {.hero-header}

29 · August 2026\
Chäsalp Zürich

:::
::: {.hero-text}
 We're looking forward to pop the bubbles & enjoy the evening with our favorite people. It would mean a lot to us if you joined us to raise a glass to love & friendship.
:::
::: {.hero-names}
with love J <img src="heart_dark_green.png" class="inline-heart"> S
:::

<div class="register-btn-wrapper">
<a href="RSVP/RSVP.html" class="register-btn">RSVP · AN/ ABMELDUNG</a>
</div>


<div class="secondary-btn-wrapper">
<a href="info/info.html" class="secondary-btn">INFO</a>
</div>

:::
